title: Vibrancy Glowing Ores
description: Adds Vibrancy subtle lights to vanilla ores
body:
![Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheTypholorian/vibrancy/refs/heads/1.21/resource_packs/glowing_ores/banner.png)
Makes all vanilla shiny ores emit a small amount of colored light, so they're easily visible in caves.
Note: This resource pack REQUIRES [Vibrancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/vibrancy) to function, and won't do anything without it.
Full list of currently supported ores:
- Diamond
- Redstone
- Gold
- Lapis
- Iron
- Copper
- Emerald
- Quartz
